topics.topicName: The user interacts with the frontend built using React. React sends requests to the backend using APIs. The backend (Node.js + Express.js) processes the request. Data is stored or retrieved from MongoDB. The response is sent back to React and displayed to the user.

subTopics.data:
The user interacts with the frontend built using React.
React sends requests to the backend using APIs.
The backend (Node.js + Express.js) processes the request.
Data is stored or retrieved from MongoDB.
The response is sent back to React and displayed to the user.
